lessons.title: Visual Testing: Principles, Technique Selection, and Equipment
objectives: Explain principles and theory of visual testing
Describe selection of the correct visual technique
Identify VT equipment and materials at a familiarity level

lessons.title: Visual Testing: Specific Applications
objectives: Describe VT applications for metal joining processes, pressure vessels, pumps, and valves
Describe VT applications for bolting, castings, forgings, extrusions, and microcircuits

lessons.title: Visual Testing: Interpretation and Evaluation
objectives: Summarize the role of codes and standards in VT interpretation and evaluation
Explain how environmental factors influence VT evaluation
